values.content:
Normalize invoice data from OCR markdown into strict JSON.

Input boundary:
- OCR markdown is already extracted by Mistral OCR.
- Do NOT perform OCR.
- Do NOT reconstruct tables differently from OCR.
- Preserve OCR row boundaries exactly.
- Never merge multiple printed rows into one row.
- Never hallucinate missing line items.

Mistral OCR responsibility (already done):
- text extraction
- layout detection
- table structure preservation
- row/column detection
- reading order

Your responsibility:
- classify document_type
- normalize fields
- structure JSON
- preserve row boundaries
- extract GST values

Document type rule:
- Compare GSTIN values case-insensitively after trim.
- IF buyer_gstin equals OUR_GSTIN => document_type = "purchase"
- IF vendor_gstin equals OUR_GSTIN => document_type = "sales"
- If both match or neither match or OUR_GSTIN missing => document_type = null

Line-level GST rules:
- If OCR has per-row CGST/SGST/IGST, extract those values per row.
- Never skip line-level GST when row values exist.
- Never distribute summary GST across rows.
- If GST exists only in summary/HSN summary and not per row, set line-item cgst/sgst/igst as null.

Return ONLY raw JSON.
Do not wrap in markdown.
Do not use code fences.
Do not add explanation text.
Never return input-wrapper keys like OUR_GSTIN or OCR_MARKDOWN.
Use null for unknown values.

Required output schema:
{
  "document_type": "purchase"|"sales"|null,
  "vendor_name": string|null,
  "vendor_gstin": string|null,
  "buyer_name": string|null,
  "buyer_gstin": string|null,
  "invoice_number": string|null,
  "invoice_date": string|null,
  "state": string|null,
  "subtotal": number|null,
  "cgst": number|null,
  "sgst": number|null,
  "igst": number|null,
  "tds": number|null,
  "round_off": number|null,
  "total_amount": number|null,
  "line_items": [
    {
      "line_no": number|null,
      "description": string|null,
      "hsn": string|null,
      "quantity": number|null,
      "quantity_raw": string|null,
      "uom": string|null,
      "rate": number|null,
      "taxable_amount": number|null,
      "cgst": number|null,
      "cgst_raw": string|null,
      "sgst": number|null,
      "sgst_raw": string|null,
      "igst": number|null,
      "igst_raw": string|null,
      "total_amount": number|null
    }
  ],
  "hsn_tax_summary": [
    {
      "hsn": string|null,
      "taxable_amount": number|null,
      "cgst_rate": number|null,
      "cgst": number|null,
      "sgst_rate": number|null,
      "sgst": number|null,
      "igst_rate": number|null,
      "igst": number|null
    }
  ]
}

parameters.name: x-workflow-key
x-workflow-key
x-tenant-id

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ action_type: 'POSTING_STARTED', notes: 'Posting orchestration started in n8n', metadata: { workflowRunId: $execution.id } }) }}

x-workflow-key
x-tenant-id

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ action_type: 'POSTING_COMPLETED', notes: 'Posting step completed in workflow', metadata: { workflowRunId: $execution.id, tallyStatus: $json.tallyStatus || null, tallyCreated: $json.tallyCreated ?? null, tallyAltered: $json.tallyAltered ?? null, tallyErrors: $json.tallyErrors ?? null, tallyExceptions: $json.tallyExceptions ?? null, reviewReasons: $json.reviewReasons ?? null } }) }}

parameters.name: x-workflow-key
x-tenant-id

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ action_type: 'POSTING_FAILED', notes: ($json.tallyLineError || 'Posting failed'), metadata: { workflowRunId: $execution.id, tallyCreated: $json.tallyCreated ?? null, tallyAltered: $json.tallyAltered ?? null, tallyErrors: $json.tallyErrors ?? null, tallyExceptions: $json.tallyExceptions ?? null } }) }}

parameters.name: x-workflow-key
x-tenant-id
x-workflow-key
x-workflow-key
x-tenant-id

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ tally_voucher_type: $json.tallyVoucherType || $json.tally_voucher_type || null, tally_voucher_number: $json.tallyVoucherNumber || $json.tally_voucher_number || null, tally_response_metadata: { workflowRunId: $execution.id, runId: $json.tallyBackendRunId || null, tallyStatus: $json.tallyStatus || null, summary: { created: $json.tallyCreated ?? null, altered: $json.tallyAltered ?? null, errors: $json.tallyErrors ?? null, exceptions: $json.tallyExceptions ?? null }, reviewReasons: $json.reviewReasons || null, responsePreview: $json.responsePreview || $json.tallyResponseRaw || null } }) }}

parameters.name: x-workflow-key
x-tenant-id

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ error_message: $json.tallyLineError || $json.message || 'Posting failed', tally_response_metadata: { workflowRunId: $execution.id, runId: $json.tallyBackendRunId || null, tallyStatus: $json.tallyStatus || null, summary: { created: $json.tallyCreated ?? null, altered: $json.tallyAltered ?? null, errors: $json.tallyErrors ?? null, exceptions: $json.tallyExceptions ?? null }, reviewReasons: $json.reviewReasons || null, responsePreview: $json.responsePreview || $json.tallyResponseRaw || null } }) }}

conditions.leftValue: ={{ (() => { const mode = String($json.postingMode || $json.posting_mode || '').toUpperCase(); const forceRaw = $json.forceAutoPost ?? $json.force_auto_post ?? false; const forceText = String(forceRaw).toLowerCase(); const forceAuto = forceRaw === true || forceText === 'true' || forceText === '1'; return mode === 'REVIEW_BEFORE_POSTING' && !forceAuto; })() }}

parameters.name: x-workflow-key
x-tenant-id

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ posting_request_xml: $json.voucherRequestXml || $json.voucher_request_xml || $json.tallyXml || $json.tally_xml || null, posting_request_xml_source: { workflowRunId: $execution.id, runId: $json.tallyBackendRunId || null, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), postingMode: $json.postingMode || $json.posting_mode || null, preValidation: $json.tallyPreValidation || null, debug: $json.tallyDebug || null } }) }}
